zh.lifeSummary: 當John Leventhorpe於1398年出生在英國賀特福爾時，他的父親Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex"28歲，母親Katherine De Riley20歲。他於1418年與Joan Barrington在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1484年5月31日在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年86歲，埋葬在英國賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Leventhorpe于1398年出生在英国賀特福爾时，他的父亲Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex"28岁，母亲Katherine De Riley20岁。他于1418年与Joan Barrington在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1484年5月31日在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯享年86岁，埋葬在英国賀特福爾薩布利其沃斯。

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When John Leventhorpe was born in 1398, in Hertfordshire, England, his father, Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex", was 28 and his mother, Katherine De Riley, was 20. He married Joan Barrington in 1418, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 31 May 1484, in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, at the age of 86, and was buried in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Leventhorpe est né en 1398, à Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex", avait 28 ans et sa mère, Katherine De Riley, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Joan Barrington en 1418, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 31 mai 1484, à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 86 ans, et a été enterré à Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Leventhorpe 1398 in Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex" 28 und seine Mutter Katherine De Riley 20. Er hat 1418 in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England Joan Barrington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 31. Mai 1484 im Alter von 86 Jahren in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England und wurde in Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Leventhorpe è nato il nel 1398 nel Hertfordshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex", aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Katherine De Riley, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Joan Barrington nel 1418, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 31 maggio 1484, nel Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England, all'età di 86 anni, e fu sepolto a Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: John Leventhorpeが1398年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex"は28歳，母Katherine De Rileyは20歳であった。1418年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスでJoan Barringtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1484年5月31日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスで86歳で死去し，イギリスハートフォードシュアイアサウブリジェウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Leventhorpe(이)가 1398년 영국 허트퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex"(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine De Riley(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1418년 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 Joan Barrington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1484년 5월 31일 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에서 86세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허트퍼드실르 사w브리지워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Leventhorpe nasceu em 1398, em Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex", tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Katherine De Riley, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Joan Barrington em 1418, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 31 de maio de 1484, em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, com 86 anos, e foi sepultado em Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Leventhorpe родился в 1398 г. в местности хиртфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex" было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine De Riley, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Barrington в 1418 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 31 мая 1484 г. в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия в возрасте 86 лет и был похоронен в местности савбриджюорт, хиртфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Leventhorpe nació en 1398, en Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Leventhorpe "Constable of Odiham Castle, Kings Esquire, Commissioner of the Peace for Herts and Essex", tenía 28 años y su mamá, Katherine De Riley, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Joan Barrington en 1418, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 31 de mayo de 1484, en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 86 años, y fue sepultado en Sawbridgeworth, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra.
